title: penstemon absarokensis
intro: Penstemon absarokensis, also known as Absaroka penstemon, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Penstemon absarokensis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Penstemon absarokensis typically involve making a tea by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or using the plant in salves and ointments to treat skin conditions.
